type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in production levels in 2020, compared to 2019 and 2018.  Further in 2020, Kiln 2 was operating 8,784 hrs versus 5,568 in 2019.  Kiln 2 has higher emission rate of total PM.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Hydrochloric acid is generated during firing shale in the kiln and is released to stack scrubbers.  It is also used during raw material testing and as an addition to our slurry coatings.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Material disposed of has been reacted with shale.  The amount of testing requires depends on the raw material data, laboratory technique and amount of natural variation within the material.

comments.comment: Material is not recycled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
In 2020, the facility produced approximately 78 million units versus in 2021, facility produced 112 million units.  Increases in production. 

The actual amount released is 59 tonnes, however the system would not accept the discrepancy of PM vs PM2.5 and PM10.  PM is measured during stack source testing but PM2.5 and PM10 are calculated using published emission factors.
